FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool9_Staged.mechanism: Tests a specific feature flag to control the rollout of new functionalities.
FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool9_Staged.purpose: Helps developers manage and test new features before fully releasing them to all players.

FFlagGamePassPrefetchOnJoinEnabled.mechanism: Preloads game pass data when a player joins a game.
FFlagGamePassPrefetchOnJoinEnabled.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves the experience for players who own game passes.

FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpCounters3.mechanism: Enables tracking of HTTP requests for better performance monitoring.
FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpCounters3.purpose: Helps improve game performance and stability by identifying issues with network requests.

DFFlagGetHlsLodManifest2_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new method for loading high-level streaming data for game assets.
DFFlagGetHlsLodManifest2_Staged.purpose: Improves the performance and loading times of games, providing a smoother experience for players.
